examples.title: Address Translation
examples.description: Logical to physical address conversion using page table
examples.code:
FUNCTION translate_address(logical_addr):
    page_num = logical_addr >> OFFSET_BITS
    offset = logical_addr & OFFSET_MASK
    IF page_num NOT IN TLB:
        frame_num = page_table[page_num]
        UPDATE TLB
    ELSE:
        frame_num = TLB[page_num]
    RETURN (frame_num << OFFSET_BITS) | offset
examples.explanation: Demonstrates page number extraction, TLB check, and physical address construction

examples.title: Pointer Address Demo
examples.description: Shows logical address visibility in user space
examples.explanation: User program sees logical addresses; physical addresses managed by OS

examples.title: Page Replacement (LRU)
examples.description: Least Recently Used page replacement algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LRU:
    FOR each memory access:
        IF page in memory:
            UPDATE access timestamp
        ELSE:
            IF free frame exists:
                LOAD page
            ELSE:
                FIND frame with oldest timestamp
                REPLACE page
                LOAD new page
examples.explanation: Tracks page usage timestamps to select least recently used page for replacement
